name: Pod Drive
description: File and folder browser over Solid LDP containers — a typed RDF model for containers and binary resources (size, mtime, content-type).

name: Pod Docs
description: Typed RDF data layer for rich-text documents (with PROV history) stored in a Solid pod.

name: Pod Photos
description: Solid photo and album app — a typed RDF data layer (schema:Photograph + EXIF→RDF + schema:ImageGallery) plus a React photo-gallery view.

name: Pod Music
description: Typed RDF data layer for tracks, albums, artists, playlists and listen-history (Music Ontology + schema.org) in a Solid pod.

name: Pod Mail
description: Solid-native mail data layer — a typed RDF model for messages, threads and folders (schema:EmailMessage / SIOC).

name: Pod Chat
description: Typed RDF data layer for ActivityStreams 2.0 chat rooms and messages, with actionable shared-task messages (wf:Task).

name: Pod Health
description: Personal-health data layer over a Solid pod — health records, vitals, conditions, medications, immunizations and GPX workouts (FHIR-aligned + QUDT).

name: Solid Pod Manager
description: Standalone Solid consumer and management app — Files, Tasks, Bookmarks, Profile/Contacts/Type-index, Sharing (WAC), Issues, Inbox/Chat/Schedule, federation discovery, plus data integrations.

name: Solid Issues
description: Jira/Monday-parity issue tracker storing wf:Task data in your pod — boards, WIP limits, dependencies, automation, control charts and live notifications.

name: Pod Money
description: Personal-finance data layer over a Solid pod — accounts, transactions, balances, holdings and categories on the fse finance (FIBO-slim) vocabulary.

name: AccessRadar
description: Web accessibility compliance SaaS — an axe-core scanner with AI remediation; auth and data are Solid-OIDC + Pod storage (no server DB).

name: Keystone
description: Multi-entity family-office consolidation with a light general ledger (descriptive bookkeeping only).

name: CapNote
description: AI capital-call and distribution-notice document automation for family-office operations — PDF→structured fields, commitment tracker, cash-flow calendar.

name: Provena
description: Collector-first, local-only art and passion-asset collection management — provenance chains, valuation/insurance/appraisal records and loan tracking.

name: Strongroom
description: Privacy-first, self-hostable family-office document and entity vault — encrypted records, granular per-person access control and a tamper-evident audit trail.

name: Furlong
description: Thoroughbred and equestrian syndicate management — horse registry, fractional ownership, expense ledger, prize-money waterfall and owner statements; Solid pod data layer.

name: FDC3 ⇄ Solid
description: Open-standards demo persisting FDC3 desktop-interop contexts (fdc3.contact, fdc3.instrument) to a Solid pod as vcard + FIBO RDF and re-broadcasting them as FDC3 contexts.
